name: MITRE Caldera — adversary-emulation automation
description: Automates adversary emulation against a remote MITRE Caldera server (v2 API). action=import (default, READ-ONLY) reads existing operations: agents → ASSET, executed abilities → findings AND → emulation_results (EMULATIONRUN/EMULATIONRESULT → the ATT&CK validation-coverage heatmap). action=launch creates + starts an operation (adversary vs. an agent group) on the remote host — automated offensive emulation (admin-only; blast radius = the Caldera agent group you deployed), optionally `wait` then import its results. Target any remote Caldera host via caldera_url; schedulable (XSCHEDULE) for recurring automation. Key stays in the worker env. Config: CALDERA_URL + CALDERA_API_KEY.

parameters.name: action
parameters.help: import = read operations (read-only); launch = create + start an operation on the remote host

parameters.name: caldera_url
parameters.help: Remote Caldera base URL (overrides CALDERA_URL) — target different remote hosts. e.g. https://caldera.lab:8888

parameters.name: operation
parameters.help: Import filter: operation name or ID (empty = all operations)

parameters.name: adversary
parameters.help: launch: adversary id or name to emulate

parameters.name: group
parameters.help: launch: Caldera agent group to run against

parameters.name: planner
parameters.help: launch: planner id or name (atomic / batch / …)

parameters.name: wait
parameters.help: launch: seconds to wait for the operation to finish before importing results

parameters.name: agents_only
parameters.help: Import only the agent inventory (skip operation results)

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved Caldera operation export JSON to parse (no server needed)
